repo_notes.content: 使用简体中文生成内容。

pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: High-level introduction to the acidify/yogurt project, explaining its purpose as a PC NTQQ protocol implementation with Milky API exposure

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.purpose: Guide users through installation, configuration, and initial setup of the Yogurt application

pages.title: Installation
pages.purpose: Instructions for downloading and setting up Yogurt, including native executables and JVM builds

pages.title: Configuration
pages.purpose: Detailed explanation of config.json and all available configuration options

pages.title: First Run and Authentication
pages.purpose: Guide through first-time login process, QR code authentication, and session management

pages.title: Architecture
pages.purpose: Comprehensive overview of system architecture, layers, and data flow patterns

pages.title: System Layers
pages.purpose: Explanation of the three-tier architecture: Protocol Layer, Acidify Core, and Yogurt Application

pages.title: Module Organization
pages.purpose: Overview of all modules (acidify-core, acidify-crypto, acidify-pb, yogurt, yogurt-*) and their relationships

pages.title: Data Flow Pipelines
pages.purpose: Detailed explanation of incoming message, outgoing message, and event distribution pipelines

pages.title: Acidify Core
pages.purpose: Deep dive into the acidify-core module, which implements the PC NTQQ protocol

pages.title: Bot Class
pages.purpose: Complete reference for the Bot class, the main programmatic API entrypoint

pages.title: Protocol Layer
pages.purpose: Explanation of PacketLogic, LoginLogic, and low-level protocol communication

pages.title: Incoming Message Parsing
pages.purpose: How raw protocol buffers are parsed into BotIncomingMessage and segments

pages.title: Outgoing Message Building
pages.purpose: MessageBuildingContext and the DSL for constructing outgoing messages

pages.title: Event System
pages.purpose: Event flow, MsgPushSignal, and how events are parsed and emitted

pages.title: Entity Management and Caching
pages.purpose: How friends, groups, and members are cached and resolved

pages.title: Media Handling
pages.purpose: Comprehensive guide to uploading and processing images, audio, video, and files

pages.title: Media Upload Protocols
pages.purpose: Detailed explanation of Highway and FlashTransfer upload mechanisms

pages.title: Image Handling
pages.purpose: Image upload, format detection, and resolution

pages.title: Audio Handling
pages.purpose: Audio encoding to SILK format and record message handling

pages.title: Video Handling
pages.purpose: Video upload, thumbnail generation, and metadata extraction

pages.title: Yogurt Application
pages.purpose: Complete guide to the Yogurt wrapper application that exposes Milky protocol

pages.title: Application Lifecycle
pages.purpose: Startup sequence, plugin installation, and shutdown procedures

pages.title: HTTP API Layer
pages.purpose: How Ktor serves the Milky API, routing, and handler architecture

pages.title: Event Distribution
pages.purpose: WebSocket, SSE, and Webhook event distribution mechanisms

pages.title: Transform Layer
pages.purpose: How data is transformed between Acidify and Milky formats

pages.title: Milky Protocol Reference
pages.purpose: Complete API reference for the Milky protocol exposed by Yogurt

pages.title: API Endpoints
pages.purpose: Reference for all HTTP API endpoints (system info, message operations, etc.)

pages.title: Event Types
pages.purpose: Reference for all event types (message receive, friend request, group notifications, etc.)

pages.title: Message Format
pages.purpose: Reference for incoming and outgoing message structures and segment types
